title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at BHIVE Workspace
jsonLd.description:
BHIVE Workspace, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BHIVE Workspace:
BHIVE Workspace is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BHIVE Workspace!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
